text:
☀ Boost Boss Standup — 2026-06-30

1) Run: ~12 fresh candidates → 10 qualified → 3 outreach drafted (gated, nothing sent). New finding: study/homework AI apps (StudyX 16M+ users, Studyable, StudyMonkey) = cleanest ICP match — huge free usage + explicit intent + weak/no monetization.
2) Needs you: confirm revenue split (70/30 vs 85/15); confirm from-name 'Tess Calloway'; approve 3 drafts.
3) Approvals: 3 drafts + 2 confirmations waiting in #approvals.
4) Watch: gate held — nothing sent. Warm the sending domain before any volume.
5) Focus: confirm split + from-name, approve drafts, bless study-AI + creative-MCP as the two primary veins.
